index.title: Welcome to Lotusia
index.description: Lotusia was founded to foster human relationships, build reciprocal culture, and bolster societal value production online and offline

ecosystem.title: Lotusia Ecosystem Overview
ecosystem.description: Three pillars working together - Stewardship guides, Treasury secures, Citizenry creates value

tools.title: Lotusia Public Goods and Tools
tools.description: Open-source software and infrastructure built for the Lotusia ecosystem

founders.title: Lotusia Founders and Leadership
founders.description: Meet the founders and core leadership of Lotusia, and learn how they are building an ethical, resilient blockchain ecosystem.

roadmap.title: Lotusia Roadmap and Milestones
roadmap.description: Explore the Lotusia roadmap, including stewardship priorities, protocol milestones, and ecosystem delivery goals for upcoming epochs.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find clear answers to the most common questions about Lotusia, the Lotus currency, governance, and ecosystem participation.

blog.title: Blog
